title: Report _all_ lint failures, and fix the outstanding ones
body:
Currently, `golangci-lint` does not report all failures if there are too many, or too many duplicates.

So, e.g. in https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/425 , we see some failures, fix them ( https://github.com/containers/container-libs/pull/427 ) — and then there are more failures to fix.

Avoid that waste by reporting all failures immediately; and fix the outstanding ones.

@TomSweeneyRedHat PTAL

comments.body: ✅ A new PR has been created in buildah to vendor these changes: **https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/6465**
